name: Chicken Cordon Bleu2
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Heavy cream or whipping cream
recipeInstructions:
1. Spread the chicken breasts flat on a cutting board. Place cheese and ham slices on top of each breast, fold edges to cover the filling completely, secure with toothpicks.
2. In a bowl, mix flour and paprika. Coat the folded chicken pieces in the mixture.
3. Heat a 12-inch skillet over medium heat with butter or margarine. Cook the chicken until browned on all sides. Add wine and crushed bouillon cube (or stock). Reduce heat to low; cover and simmer for 30 minutes or until fork tender. Remove toothpicks.
4. In a bowl, whisk cornstarch and cream until smooth. Gradually stir into the skillet, cooking while stirring constantly. Serve over chicken.
